rows.notes: parent_company: Ashton | Ashton portfolio — Refined San Cristobal — smoother aromatic alternative to Clasico with molasses and coffee.
rows.wrapperRole: Ecuadorian Habano adds aromatic spice and sweet molasses top notes.
rows.binderRole: Nicaraguan binder keeps the blend cohesive and elegant.
rows.fillerRole: Nicaraguan filler supplies coffee, cedar, and medium-full refinement.
rows.flavorNotes: sweet molasses, coffee, cedar, cinnamon, cocoa
rows.bestFor: Belgian quadrupel, complex Japanese whisky, dark roast drip coffee, Ashton refined slot.
rows.avoidIf: User wants maximum pepper bomb Clasico only.
rows.whyRecommend: Recommend as refined San Cristobal within Ashton ecosystem flights — not the same as Clasico power.
rows.catalogLine: San Cristobal Quintessence · 5 × 50 · Robusto · Medium-Full · Nicaragua · $12 · Notes: molasses, coffee, cedar
rows.memberBlurb: San Cristobal Quintessence — Ashton-distributed refined line: aromatic Habano wrapper vs Clasico pepper forward.
rows.sizeNote: Refined Option in Ashton + San Cristobal single-brand flights.

rows.notes: Padron portfolio — Entry tier (Thousands) — aged 2.5–3 years — crisp wood, earth, light cocoa, sharp pepper. — Natural wrapper; representative 3000 corona.
rows.wrapperRole: Natural Nicaraguan wrapper delivers crisp wood, earth, and light cocoa with a clean pepper finish.
rows.binderRole: Nicaraguan binder supports honest Thousands-series construction.
rows.fillerRole: Nicaraguan filler — aged 2.5–3 years — straightforward medium body.
rows.flavorNotes: crisp wood, earth, light cocoa, sharp pepper
rows.bestFor: Nutty brown ales, light-to-medium roast coffee, smooth Irish whiskey, everyday Padron entry.
rows.avoidIf: User wants full maduro sweetness, 1964 box-pressed luxury only, or ultra-mild Connecticut (see Damaso).
rows.whyRecommend: Recommend as Padron Thousands natural — affordable daily driver before 1964 tier.
rows.memberBlurb: Padron Thousands 3000 natural — entry-tier corona with crisp wood and pepper; the affordable Padron lesson.
rows.sizeNote: Thousands 3000; L4-PAD-2000 is Robusto natural; CUR-42 is maduro sibling.

rows.notes: Padron portfolio — Entry tier (Thousands) — maduro — dark baking chocolate, heavy espresso, toast. — Aged 2.5–3 years.
rows.wrapperRole: Maduro wrapper adds dark baking chocolate, espresso, and toasted depth.
rows.binderRole: Nicaraguan binder anchors the maduro Thousands profile.
rows.fillerRole: Aged Nicaraguan filler delivers medium-full body and coffee-forward sweetness.
rows.flavorNotes: dark baking chocolate, espresso, toast, earth, cedar
rows.bestFor: Dry Irish stouts, traditional espresso shots, sweet bourbon, Padron contrast vs natural Thousands.
rows.avoidIf: User wants mildest Connecticut only (Damaso) or 1926 power only.
rows.whyRecommend: Recommend as Thousands maduro contrast — sweeter, heavier than 3000 natural.
rows.memberBlurb: Padron 3000 maduro — baking chocolate and espresso in the Thousands tier; step up from natural before 1964.
rows.sizeNote: Pair with CUR-41 natural for wrapper contrast within Padron-only flights.

rows.notes: Padron portfolio — Entry tier — Thousands Robusto maduro — dark chocolate, espresso, toast. — Natural Robusto = L4-PAD-2000.
rows.wrapperRole: Maduro wrapper on classic 5½ × 50 format — heavier cocoa and espresso than natural.
rows.fillerRole: Nicaraguan filler — aged 2.5–3 years — robust daily profile.
rows.flavorNotes: dark chocolate, espresso, toast, earth, cedar
rows.bestFor: Stout, espresso, sweet bourbon; Padron wildcard vs L4-PAD-2000 natural.
rows.avoidIf: Beginner nicotine-sensitive or user asked for Thousands natural only.
rows.whyRecommend: Recommend when user wants Padron Thousands with maduro weight on robusto format.
rows.memberBlurb: Thousands Robusto maduro — same honest Padron puro as 2000 natural, with maduro sweetness dialed up.
rows.sizeNote: L4-PAD-2000 = natural sibling; do not duplicate in same flight.

rows.notes: Padron portfolio — Premium tier (1964) — box-pressed, 4-year aged — natural Exclusivo. — Toasted nuts, cedar, coffee, velvety baking spice.
rows.wrapperRole: Natural Nicaraguan wrapper on box-pressed 1964 — toasted nuts and cedar over coffee bean.
rows.binderRole: Nicaraguan binder — 4-year aged stock — seamless burn.
rows.fillerRole: Nicaraguan filler — flagship benchmark body without maduro sweetness.
rows.flavorNotes: toasted nuts, cedar, coffee bean, baking spice, cocoa
rows.bestFor: Speyside single malt, añejo tequila, clean rye whiskey, Padron premium Best Pick.
rows.avoidIf: User wants maximum maduro molasses only (see maduro Exclusivo/Torpedo) or Thousands price point.
rows.whyRecommend: Recommend as 1964 natural flagship — gold standard for premium spirits pairing.
rows.sizeNote: CUR-13-PAD-1964-EX skews maduro in CA source; this row is natural Exclusivo.

rows.notes: Padron portfolio — Premium tier (1964) — Torpedo natural — same 4-year aged complexity, tapered head. —
rows.wrapperRole: Natural wrapper on torpedo format concentrates cedar and nutty top notes.
rows.flavorNotes: toasted nuts, cedar, coffee, baking spice, cocoa
rows.bestFor: Speyside malt, añejo tequila, rye; refined Padron 1964 vitola choice.
rows.avoidIf: User wants short robusto time window or full maduro body.
rows.whyRecommend: Recommend when user wants 1964 natural in torpedo format — not Exclusivo duplicate.
rows.sizeNote: Distinct vitola from Exclusivo within 1964 natural tier.

rows.notes: Padron portfolio — Premium tier (1964) — Torpedo maduro — intense cocoa, molasses, dark roast coffee. — 4-year aged box-pressed.
rows.wrapperRole: Maduro wrapper drives molasses, dark cocoa, and sweet earth on torpedo.
rows.fillerRole: Nicaraguan filler — flagship maduro pairing weight.
rows.flavorNotes: dark cocoa, molasses, dark coffee, sweet earth, cedar
rows.bestFor: Heavy Cabernet, cask-strength bourbon, port wine, Padron premium maduro pick.
rows.avoidIf: Beginner or user wants natural 1964 only.
rows.whyRecommend: Recommend for bold pours against 1964 maduro torpedo — full body, sweet earth finish.
rows.sizeNote: Pairs with CUR-44/45 natural siblings for wrapper arc in Padron flights.

rows.notes: Padron portfolio — Super-premium (1926) — 5-year aged — No. 2 natural figurado. — Heavy pepper, dark chocolate, leather, oily char.
rows.wrapperRole: Natural wrapper on 1926 stock — pepper and leather up front.
rows.flavorNotes: black pepper, dark chocolate, leather, cedar, oily char
rows.bestFor: Smoky Islay Scotch, cask-strength rum, double ristretto, Padron power Best Pick.
rows.avoidIf: Beginner, nicotine-sensitive, or user wants 1964 smoothness only.
rows.whyRecommend: Recommend when user wants Padron 1926 power on figurado No. 2 — natural wrapper.
rows.sizeNote: CUR-19 is No. 35; CA24-04 is No. 6; this is No. 2 flagship format.

rows.notes: Padron portfolio — Super-premium (1926) — No. 2 maduro — cocoa, molasses, pepper, leather. — 5-year aged.
rows.wrapperRole: Maduro wrapper adds molasses sweetness over 1926 strength.
rows.binderRole: Nicaraguan binder — full combustion on figurado.
rows.fillerRole: Nicaraguan filler — boldest Padron tier below Family Reserve.
rows.flavorNotes: dark cocoa, molasses, black pepper, leather, char
rows.bestFor: Cask-strength bourbon, Islay Scotch, espresso, Padron super-premium maduro.
rows.avoidIf: User wants mild Damaso or Thousands entry tier.
rows.whyRecommend: Recommend as 1926 No. 2 maduro — maximum Padron pairing weight before Family Reserve.
rows.sizeNote: Wildcard vs CUR-47 natural within 1926 tier.

rows.notes: Padron portfolio — Super-premium (1926) — No. 9 toro natural — pepper, chocolate, leather. —
rows.wrapperRole: Natural wrapper on large 6¼ × 52 toro — extended full-bodied session.
rows.flavorNotes: black pepper, dark chocolate, leather, cedar, sweetness
rows.bestFor: Islay Scotch, cask-strength rum, espresso, long after-dinner Padron.

rows.notes: Padron portfolio — Super-premium (1926) — No. 9 maduro toro. —
rows.wrapperRole: Maduro wrapper on 1926 No. 9 — molasses and dark cocoa over pepper.
rows.flavorNotes: dark cocoa, molasses, pepper, leather, char
rows.bestFor: Cask-strength bourbon, port, double espresso, Padron 1926 Best Pick (maduro).
rows.avoidIf: Mild Connecticut or Thousands tier only.

rows.notes: Padron portfolio — Luxury tier (Family Reserve) — 10+ year aged private reserves — No. 44 torpedo. — Deep earth, dark fruit, cocoa, long creamy finish.
rows.wrapperRole: Aged Nicaraguan wrapper — massive complexity without harshness.
rows.fillerRole: Nicaraguan filler — shifting earth, fruit, cocoa arc.
rows.flavorNotes: deep earth, dark fruit, cocoa, cream, cedar
rows.bestFor: Extra añejo tequila, Blue Label Scotch, rare cognac, Padron refined luxury slot.
rows.avoidIf: Budget cap under $25 or user wants Thousands/1964 only.
rows.whyRecommend: Recommend as Family Reserve refined option — pinnacle smoothness, No. 44 format.
